text:
to locate the information you need, please contact ResDAC.
| SAS Name | Variable Name | 
|---|---|
| CCN | CMS Certification Number (Facility Provider Number) | 
| PRVDR_STATE | Provider State | 
| FAC_TIER | Tier 1: 25+ AHCAH Patients; Tier 2: <= 24 AHCAH Patients | 
| FAC_DATA_SUBMSN_DT | Facility Data Submission Date | 
| DISCHARGES | Count of AHCAH Discharges During the Data Submission Period | 
| MORTALITIES | Count of AHCAH Mortalities During the Data Submission Period | 
| ESCALATIONS |
